plugins.name: ai-toolkit-dev
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring Claude Code plugins, marketplaces, and skills (work in progress)

plugins.name: project-setup
plugins.description: Architectural decision-maker for repos — new and existing. Triggers on any layout / structural / convention decision: where a file or folder belongs, monorepo vs polyrepo, adding or splitting services, picking a database or ML orchestrator, docker / compose layout, env-config split, secrets, design tokens, modularity, mobile / desktop targets. Bootstrap AND restructure. One slash command (/ps-setup) with init | audit | suggest modes. Composes with sibling dstack and documentation-guide skills (work in progress).

plugins.name: documentation-guide
plugins.description: Operating manual for the documentation-template Astro framework — writing markdown, configuring site.yaml/navbar.yaml/footer.yaml, the folder-per-issue tracker, blog posts, themes. Triages tasks to domain-specific reference files (writing, docs-layout, blog-layout, issue-layout, settings-layout). Ships 11 CLI wrappers (docs-list/show/subtasks/agent-logs/set-state/add-comment/add-agent-log/review-queue plus docs-check-blog/config/section validators) and 2 slash commands (/docs-init to bootstrap a new docs project, /docs-add-section to scaffold a new section).

plugins.name: dstack
plugins.description: Upstream dstack skill (vendor-tracked from dstackai/dstack). dstack is an open-source control plane for GPU provisioning and orchestration across GPU clouds, Kubernetes, and on-prem clusters — running dev environments, tasks, and services, managing fleets/volumes/gateways, and applying `*.dstack.yml` configurations via the `dstack` CLI.
